title: Remp-it 2
overview: It has been 13 years since the incident that happened to Madi and Spark. Madi is now working as an instructor at a scrambler training centre which is owned by Roy and runs a workshop with Macha. Macha is now happy with his wife, Ieka and his son, but that is short lived.
